subject: Q4 packet reminder and December sit-down
snippet: Chief has held Dec 5 morning for the equipment upgrade quarterly and wants the university plan on the same table
body: Arjun. Chief has held December 5 morning for the equipment quarterly review. He mentioned you plan to sit the family down that evening about Rohan. He would like the university financial picture attached to the Q4 packet so his office can flag any overlap with the equipment capital call. Please send by December 2. Best. Nwosu Family Office.

subject: SS3 term commencement and predicted grade window
snippet: SS3 begins January 12. Predicted grade sheets issued March
body: Dear Mr and Mrs Gonzales. Confirming SS3 commences January 12 2027. Predicted grade sheets for university applications will be issued in the March half-term window. Mr Adeyemi (physics) and Mrs Balogun (mathematics) have both confirmed they can write for Rohan if approached by mid-February. Warmly. Dr Chike Okonkwo.

subject: BITSAT 2027 registration window and international candidate fees
snippet: BITSAT online registration January 15 to April 15. International category fee INR 8500
body: Thank you for your query regarding BITSAT 2027. Online registration opens January 15 and closes April 15 2027. International category fee is INR 8500. NRI quota seats are separate; documentation guidance is attached. Regards. BITS Pilani Admissions.

subject: UCAS deadline confirmation for 2027 entry
snippet: Engineering courses close 15 October 2026 for 2027 entry; late applications closed
body: Dear applicant. Engineering course applications for 2027 entry closed 15 October 2026 through UCAS. We recommend planning for 2028 entry with the equivalent October 2027 deadline. Kind regards. Imperial College London Admissions.

subject: Abuja Q1 order forecast
snippet: Q1 forecast 480 cases Tamarind Stout pending your production confirm
body: Arjun. Q1 forecast is 480 cases of Tamarind Stout across Abuja retail. Need production commit by Nov 30 to lock the distribution slots. Funke.

subject: November transfer confirmation for Maa
snippet: Sent 275000 through the usual route. Landing tomorrow
body: Priya. Sent November transfer for Maa this morning. 275000 as always. Should land in the Chennai account by tomorrow noon your time. Give me a call when convenient. Arjun.

subject: Chemical Engineering department news October 2026
snippet: Two senior faculty transitions and new materials focus for 2027 intake
body: Prospective family newsletter. October 2026 update. Two senior chemical engineering faculty have transitioned out; incoming cohort will see coursework reshuffled toward materials and process modeling. Financial aid remains need-blind for international applicants. Regards. Caltech Office of Undergraduate Admissions.

subject: Revised 15-barrel quotation and lead times
snippet: Q4 revised quote 268400 EUR CIF Lagos 22-week lead time
body: Arjun. Attached is our revised 15-barrel unitank quotation. 268400 EUR CIF Lagos. Lead time 22 weeks from deposit. Includes the CIP skid and glycol chiller you asked about. Best regards. BrauKon Sales.

subject: Tamarind Stout batch 14 pH notes
snippet: Batch 14 finished at pH 4.18. Focus group notes attached
body: Boss. Batch 14 came in at pH 4.18 which is where we wanted it. Focus group ran Saturday. Notes are in the Notion recipe workspace. Yemi.

subject: Physics olympiad regional result
body: Dad. Silver in the regionals. National round is Feb 21 in Ibadan. Miss Mrs Balogun said this will strengthen the reference. Rohan.

subject: Re: Q4 packet reminder and December sit-down
snippet: Will send university financial picture with Q4 by Dec 2. Confirmed
body: Noted. University financial picture will be attached to the Q4 packet by December 2 as requested. Arjun.
